Executing Plan Step 1:
Task description: Modify the index.js file to include a counter function by deleting the existing code in the file and then writing the function
Target File: src/index.js (Absolute path in the sandbox environment: /workspace/repo/src/index.js)
Expected Action Type: modify

Please edit or modify the codebase to accomplish this specific step. Keep your changes strictly within scope. Focus only on completing this target task.

CRITICAL DIRECTIVE:
To completely replace or write the contents of a file, use a terminal write command (e.g., cat << 'EOF' > path) instead of 'str_replace' to avoid verbatim string matching failures.
